events.title: Full Moon & Lion's Gate Celebration with Jeremy Sol
events.description: Jeremy Sol's monthly Full Moon Bhakti gathering takes on rare elevation this August — the 8/8 Lion's Gate Portal and the Full Moon converge at Alchemy Yoga's rice-field sanctuary in Sayan. The evening opens with devotional singing and mantra, moves into Nataraja Ecstatic Dance, weaves through Sound Healing, and closes with a Fire Ritual at the edge of the jungle. Hosted by Bhakti Bliss Bali. Community capacity at AYMC — arrive early.
events.short_description: Jeremy Sol's Full Moon Bhakti at AYMC on the 8/8 Lion's Gate — devotional singing, Nataraja Ecstatic Dance, Sound Healing, and Fire Ritual in the rice fields of Sayan.
events.venue_address: Jl. Raya Sayan, Sayan, Ubud, Bali
